nasb.text: With you, moreover, there shall be a man of each tribe, each one head of his father’s household.

esv.text: And there shall be with you a man from each tribe, each man being the head of the house of his fathers.

cnv.text: 每一個支派要有一人幫助你們；他們每一個都是他父家的首領。

ccb.text: 每一支派要有一个人来协助你们。他们都是各宗族的族长，
